text:
# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Academic Affairs section is the institutional office that oversees a variety of academic programs and departments.

The section plays a pivotal role in advising students and assisting them as they navigate their academic pathway towards completing degree. The Academic Affairs facilitates students with a whole range of academic functions including admission, pre- registration, registration, examination & grading function and processing student requests.

The section is responsible for the implementation of the decisions taken on academic matters by the Senate.

IIT Jammu started its journey in the year 2016 with 3 UG programs and has grown now offering UG in 7 programmes, M.Tech in 8 specializations, M.Sc./MS(R) in 2 programmes and Ph.D. in 11 programmes. In addition to regular M.Tech programme IIT Jammu is also offering Executive M. Tech. for Working Professionals in Artificial Int

#### PG Section

text:

- Notification of Sub-committees

text:
# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

### Dr. Sartaj Ul Hasan

#### Dean | Academics

### Message

We extend hearty welcome to all students who have joined IIT Jammu, the fastest growing third generation IIT. IIT Jammu blends the approach of interactive and hands-on learning into its pedagogic principles. Curriculum template in the academic system of IIT Jammu has been structured to be multi-disciplinary to cater to the rapidly changing scientific and technological needs of the global community. The programs are designed to encourage students to relate academic theory to real-world practice and to collaborate with like-minded community in and out of the lecture hall.

Academic Section Website provides details of all academic programs and courses offered for you to pick and choose your track of specialisation. Our team lends support to all your academic administration issues that you may have. Please feel free meet the
